identity.name: La Băiatu'
identity.target_audience: Locals seeking comfort food, Tourists wanting authentic experience, Families

mood_board: Generous white space with warm tint

headings.usage: Section titles, Hero text, Dish names

accents.usage: Chef's notes, Special offers, Price tags

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-serif shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-serif transition-all

cards.menu_item: bg-white border border-border/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl overflow-hidden group
cards.review: bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-border p-8 rounded-lg shadow-sm relative italic
cards.feature: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl aspect-[4/5] group cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-white border-input focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12

layout_patterns.hero: Split screen: Left content (Text + CTA) with heavy vertical padding, Right image (Full height cover) or Center aligned with background overlay
layout_patterns.menu_section: Tabs for categories (Breakfast, Soups, etc.) -> Grid of dishes. Each dish card has image top, title serif, dotted leader line to price, description below.
layout_patterns.bento_grid: Use for 'Popular Dishes'. Mix of large squares (featured item) and smaller rectangles (secondary items).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind Colors: Update tailwind.config.js with the specific hex codes provided in 'visual_strategy.colors'. Do not use default slate/zinc.
2. Fonts: Import 'Playfair Display', 'Lato', and 'Caveat' from Google Fonts in index.css.
3. Hero Section: Must use a warm overlay (bg-black/40 or bg-primary/20) on the background image to ensure text readability.
4. Menu: Implement a tabbed interface. Do not list all items in one long scroll. Use 'Tabs' component from shadcn/ui.
5. Reservations: Use the 'Calendar' and 'Popover' components for the date picker. Style it to match the warm theme (no blue accents).
6. Maps: Use the real address (Aleea Anemonelor 21, 330055 Deva) in the iframe embed.
7. Language: Ensure all visible text is in Romanian as per requirements (Meniu, Despre Noi, Contact, Rezervări).
8. Animations: Add gentle fade-in-up animations to menu cards using framer-motion or tailwind-animate.
9. Shadows: Use 'shadow-lg' and 'shadow-xl' on hover for cards to give them depth, mimicking physical menu cards.
10. Texture: Consider adding a subtle noise texture to the body background if possible for that 'paper' feel.

DO_NOT: Use purple, blue (except links), or cool grays.
Use generic 'Lorem Ipsum' - use food-related placeholders if needed.
Use default shadcn radius - stick to 0.5rem or 0.75rem.
MUST: Mobile-First: Ensure the menu is readable on phones (1 column).
Accessible: Ensure text contrast on the primary red background is high enough (use white text).
Performance: Lazy load images below the fold.
